body:
## Problem

Both /stats and /stats/gear-insights have Dataset JSON-LD schema (confirmed in api/meta/[...path].js lines 245-290), but neither emits a faqSchema. FAQPage is required for Google AI Overview and PAA (People Also Ask) eligibility on statistical/data queries.

High-intent GSC query bucket we're missing:
- 'what drum brand do most metal drummers use?'
- 'which cymbal brand is most popular in metal?'
- 'what pedals do metal drummers use?'
- 'which drum kit is most used in metal?'

Both pages are at sitemap priority 0.9 — they deserve full schema treatment.

## Fix

File: api/meta/[...path].js

For /stats handler (around line 245), add faqSchema:

faqSchema: [
  {
    question: 'What drum brand do most metal drummers use?',
    answer: 'Tama is the most popular drum brand among metal drummers on MetalForge, used by a significant percentage of the 60+ pros in the database. DW, Pearl, and Ludwig are also widely represented.',
  },
  {
    question: 'Which cymbal brand is most popular with metal drummers?',
    answer: 'Zildjian leads cymbal adoption among metal drummers, followed closely by Meinl, Sabian, and Paiste. Many extreme metal drummers favour Meinl for their darker tone.',
  },
  {
    question: 'What pedals do professional metal drummers prefer?',
    answer: 'DW 9000 and Tama Iron Cobra are the most commonly used double bass pedals among the metal drummers profiled on MetalForge.',
  },
],

For /stats/gear-insights handler (around line 271), add same faqSchema (tailored to data-query intent).

## Pages affected
- /stats (sitemap priority 0.9)
- /stats/gear-insights (sitemap priority 0.9)

## Estimated uplift
AI Overview eligibility for brand-stats queries. MetalForge's unique dataset (60+ drummers, brand percentages) positions it as an authoritative source AI assistants should cite for 'most popular drum brand' type queries.

## GSC query bucket served
'most popular drum brand metal', 'what drums do metal drummers use', 'cymbal brand statistics' — AI Overview + PAA.

## Verify
1. curl https://metalforge.io/api/meta?path=/stats/gear-insights | grep FAQPage returns a hit
2. Google Rich Results Test on https://metalforge.io/stats/gear-insights shows FAQPage detected
3. Schema validates at https://validator.schema.org/
4. /stats handler also emits faqSchema

## Done
faqSchema added to both /stats and /stats/gear-insights return objects in api/meta/[...path].js.
title: SEO: /stats + /stats/gear-insights — add FAQPage JSON-LD for AI Overview eligibility
